title: Touchup tutorial for run changes
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Fix the `buildah run` command example that was broken and briefly introduce Podman and its `podman run` command.  I expect @ipbabble will want to go back and scrub this later, but this short term fix will hopefuly ease the confusion folks are having.

Addresses #733
